# hubspot_property_group (Resource)

Manages one HubSpot CRM property group for an exact CRM object type.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hubspot_property_group" "marketing" {
  object_type   = "contacts"
  name          = "marketing"
  label         = "Marketing"
  display_order = -1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `label` (String) Display label for the property group.
- `name` (String) Immutable property group internal name.
- `object_type` (String) Exact HubSpot CRM object type API identifier, such as `contacts`.

### Optional

- `display_order` (Number) HubSpot display order; `-1` places the group after positive values.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Canonical `object_type/name` identity.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
tofu import hubspot_property_group.marketing 'contacts/marketing'
```
